name: divergent
description: Team Divergent — a full veteran software team delivered as Claude Code subagents, with playbook skills and a dispatcher command.

plugins.name: team-divergent
plugins.description: Eight veteran subagents (research, design, frontend, backend, QA, security, DevOps, and an orchestrator) plus their personal playbook skills and a dispatcher command. Research-driven design (Apple HIG + Google Material), strict Color Wheel Theory + 8pt system, unified components, and a design-first backend.
